description: Real on-disk capture of a `local_workflow` run (the `capture-probe` workflow), preserved verbatim from a research session. Layout mirrors the agent workspace: <sessionId>/subagents/workflows/<runId>/{journal.jsonl,agent-<id>.jsonl,agent-<id>.meta.json} and <sessionId>/workflows/scripts/<name>-<runId>.js. Used to test the disk-reading workflow tree builder + routes (NOT a persister stream replay).
